# DocPack
> Free online tool for image compression, PDF conversion, and social media resizing.

## What DocPack does
- Compresses images to under 2MB while maintaining quality
- Converts multiple images into a single PDF file
- Resizes images to fit Instagram, Facebook, and other social media formats
- Works entirely in the browser — no signup required
- Free to use, no watermarks

## Who uses DocPack
- Job seekers compressing resume photos for Korean public institution submissions
- Teachers and instructors uploading profile documents to TeacherMatch
- Content creators resizing images for Instagram and Facebook
- Anyone needing to reduce file size for email or web upload

## Features
- Image Compression: JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC → optimized JPEG under 2MB
- PDF Conversion: Multiple images → single PDF document
- Social Media Resize: Instagram 1:1 (1080x1080), 4:5 (1080x1350), Facebook 1.91:1 (1200x630), 9:16 (1080x1920)
- Bilingual interface: English and Korean
- Progressive JPEG output with metadata stripping

## Related services
- TeacherMatch (https://teachermatch.kr) — connects Korean schools with instructors
- HelloKorean (https://hellokorean.org) — Korean language learning for international students
- rolli (https://rolli.ac) — personal link page builder

## Contact
- Website: https://docpack.kr
